{"society_power": 7.7, "state_power": 8.2, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": 0.8, "key_event": "BJP centralization and digital state vs. periodic societal pushback", "reasoning": "State power rose markedly via executive centralization, digital legibility (Aadhaar/UPI), and coercive assertions (Article 370, demonetization, Pegasus), pushing it into the strong 8 range. Society weakened modestly through press/NGO constraints and majoritarian fragmentation, yet retained real countervailing force (farm-law repeal, 2024 coalition verdict), leaving it strong but eroded."}
